column2: ʻoʻ maybiʔil ka wasal kašnaʔitol ray ʔömäh.
and after-then ka sea rise on land.
mäʔiyäh saböh sasəzek ilah ray wasal.
man all sink already in sea.
ay "ta taböʔ ilah söʔhäʔ ka mäʔiyäh ray ʻokoʔ.
ay “let-us load already one-man ka man on pirogue.
ka ʻokoʔ noka ralom ʔarašan oʻ potŋor ilah papak.
ka pirogue by water be-carried-away and arrive already Papak.
papak hayzaʻ košan heʻ ʔöpöh-na-boʻoŋ komošaʻ
Papak exist be-said he ʔöpöh-na-bo‘oŋ says.
mariʔin riʔsazaʻ, päʔaltikən kitaʔən ray ʻokoʔ
be-taken thereupon, be-opened be-seen in pirogue
ʔay, "šoʻ nakʔisazaʻ, hiniʻ ray ʔömäh ta mäʔiyäh ʻokaʔ ilah.
ay “you then, this in land our man none already.
hiniʻ ka mäʔiyäh mariʔaw mitaʔ oʻ pakonhöyhaw ilah ka mäʔiyäh tasʔölaw.
this ka man let's-take by-us let's-it-reproduce already ka man let's-it-be-born.
hiwaʔən oʻ ʔäʔäpolon ilah ka mäʔiyäh šinrähöʔ.
be-cut and be-divided already ka man races.
ka ʻotöh košaʻan šiʔösaʻ ray wasal.
ka bowels be-said be-thrown in sea.
ʻoʻ šiʔösaʻ ray wasal ʻoʻ šiŋaʔŋaʔ ilah, ʻoʻ ʻonähŋəʻ ilah.
and be-thrown in sea and soon already, and long-time already.
ka wasal, hiniʻ ka ralom, kitaʔən mäʔših ilah.
ka sea, this ka water, be-seen ebb-tide already.
